verdict.headline: Tick lag during capture — review hot methods and entity pressure below

key_findings.title: High experience orb count (633)
key_findings.detail: XP orbs add entity tick cost

key_findings.title: Elevated create:super_glue (376)
key_findings.detail: Create contraptions or glue may be loaded

recommendations.title: Address severe tick lag
recommendations.detail: Profiler ran while the server was struggling. Fix sim distance, entity pressure, and heavy mods.
actions: Lower simulation distance and view distance if MSPT is high
Profile while lag is active (30–60s sample)
Pause world pregen during peak player hours

recommendations.title: Clear excess XP orbs
recommendations.detail: 633 experience orbs were present — common farm leak.
actions: Fix mob farm XP collection (hopper, vacuum, etc.)

recommendations.title: Review Create contraptions
recommendations.detail: create:super_glue count was high during capture.
actions: Inspect active Create contraptions and super glue blocks
Reduce loaded chunk count for heavy Create builds

recommendations.title: Consider player-driven lag
recommendations.detail: 6 players were online — chunk loading and player entities add cost.
actions: Check per-player loaded chunks and bases
Spread large builds across dimensions if possible

recommendations.title: Refresh this report
recommendations.detail: Capture a new profile while lagging, then run a Watchtower report.
actions: Run report from dashboard or /watchtower run
